description: This file contains unit tests for the RiskDecisioningService, specifically testing decision rules and scoring based on various input scenarios in the business loan risk assessment context.

classes.name: test_risk_decisioning_service_test
classes.description: JUnit test class for assessing the core decisioning behaviors of the RiskDecisioningService, including thresholds for decline, pre-qualification, and score penalties based on external credit bureau reports.

methods.name: hardDecline_revenueNonPositive
methods.description: Tests that a non-positive annual revenue results in a declined decision with appropriate reason.

methods.name: highQuality_preQualified
methods.description: Verifies that a high-quality credit report and favorable application details produce a pre-qualified decision with a high score.

methods.name: identityMismatch_penalizesScore
methods.description: Checks that a mismatch flagged by the credit bureau reduces the scoring and potentially triggers manual review.
